en:
Drop a screenshot of the game's 4×5 hero pool here and the app will recognize the 20 heroes and limit picks + recommendations to just those.

After upload, you can click any cell to fix a wrong guess. Then hit Apply Pool Filter.

The two smaller buttons at the top are only needed if the game adds new heroes or updates art - can be ignored in most cases.
zh:
将游戏的 4×5 英雄阵容池截图拖放至此，应用将识别 20 位英雄并将选择和推荐限制在这些英雄中。

上传后，可以点击任意单元格修正错误识别，然后点击应用阵容筛选。

顶部的两个小按钮仅在游戏添加新英雄或更新立绘时需要，通常可以忽略。
